---
title: "My Presentation"
author: "Your Name"
format:
  clean-nav-revealjs:
    slide-number: "c/t"
    # Point at a project-local nav-sections.js to override the default
    # sidebar sections. Remove this block to use the default sections
    # shipped with the extension.
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <script src="nav-sections.js"></script>
subtitle: "A starter template for the clean-nav theme"
---

# Introduction

## Welcome {.nav-intro}

This is a starter slide in the **Introduction** section.

- Bullet one
- Bullet two

## Another intro slide {.nav-intro}

Math works too: $E = mc^2$.

# Methods

## Our approach {.nav-methods}

Add `{.nav-<key>}` to a heading to place it in that sidebar section, where
`<key>` matches an entry in `nav-sections.js`.

# Results

## Findings {.nav-results}

Add `{.nav-none}` to hide the sidebar on a slide.

## Backup slide {.nav-none}

This slide has no sidebar.
